chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–4361 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.18060/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 28.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Qaiser Hassan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mehar, AAG Sindh. Mr. Dhani Bux Lashari, Advocate for SBCA. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for SBCA. Mr. Ashraf Ali Mirani, Law Officer, Culture, Tourism, Antiquities and Achieves Department, Government of Sindh. Engineer Irfan Ali, Secretary TCDB. Engineer Arif Kassam, PEC. Arch. Zia Jaffery, PCATP. Mr. Tariq Jameel, Advocate for KDA. ------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition which is accordingly dismissed alongwith listed application. However, he submits that his articles are lying in the shop which he may be allowed to remove which is not opposed by the other side. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Asif
